mnemonics: TEST: Think about the Essential System Tasks (CPU, Memory, I/O) when studying for the test.
keyPoints: Understand the core functions of an OS: process management, memory management, and file systems.
Be able to explain key concepts like virtual memory, scheduling algorithms, and deadlocks.
Know the differences between user mode and kernel mode execution.
commonMistakes: Confusing paging with segmentation in memory management.
Mixing up the different CPU scheduling algorithms (e.g., FCFS vs Round Robin).
Forgetting that system calls require a switch from user mode to kernel mode.
